description: Shared regression fixture for issue #6 (consolidate duplicated XDR decoder implementations). Each case is rendered independently by indexer/src/decoder.js (buildDescription, authoritative — this is what octraban_frontend consumes) and by src/indexer/sep41-parser.ts (SEP41_EVENTS + renderSep41Template). Both must produce the exact `expected` string. See tests/indexer/decoder-parity.test.ts and indexer/tests/decoder-parity.test.js.

cases.expected: Address GABC12…34YZ transferred 100000000 USDC to GXYZ98…76ED on USDC Token
100000000 USDC minted to GXYZ98…76ED on USDC Token
100000000 USDC burned from GABC12…34YZ on USDC Token
CLAWBACK: 100000000 USDC recovered from GABC12…34YZ by authority GADMIN…3444 on USDC Token
